hooks.hook_text: POV: You solved the riddle, cracked the vault code, and crawled through a door into Vegas' #1 speakeasy. The mood questionnaire just matched you to a $28 cocktail that doesn't exist on any menu.
hooks.visual_suggestion: Split screen: person crawling through vault door vs. bartender crafting bespoke cocktail

hooks.hook_text: POV: The bartender hands you a cocktail based on your personality test while Victorian oddities watch from glass cases. You're inside The Lock — Vegas' Best Speakeasy 2025.
hooks.visual_suggestion: Close-up of ornate cocktail surrounded by curiosity cabinet artifacts

hooks.hook_text: POV: You're one of 47 people who found the hidden entrance tonight. The rest are still drinking overpriced cocktails upstairs.
hooks.visual_suggestion: Contrast shot: crowded main bar vs. intimate speakeasy interior

hooks.hook_text: POV: Your friends think you disappeared in Vegas. You're actually behind a vault door drinking cocktails that cost more than their dinner.
hooks.visual_suggestion: Person checking phone with 'where are you?' texts while holding premium cocktail

hooks.hook_text: When the bartender said 'take the mood quiz,' I thought it was a gimmick. Then they made me a $32 cocktail that tasted like my childhood memories.
hooks.visual_suggestion: Emotional reaction shot while tasting cocktail, mood questionnaire visible

hooks.hook_text: Nobody told me Vegas' Best Speakeasy 2025 required crawling through an actual vault. My knees hurt but this cocktail is worth it.
hooks.visual_suggestion: Before/after: person hesitating at vault entrance vs. enjoying cocktail inside

hooks.hook_text: Plot twist: The real treasure wasn't solving the riddle. It was the $35 personalized cocktail waiting behind the vault door.
hooks.visual_suggestion: Hands holding elaborate cocktail with vault door visible in background

hooks.hook_text: Think you're smart enough to crack the vault code at Horseshoe Vegas? 73% of people give up before finding The Lock speakeasy.
hooks.visual_suggestion: Close-up of hands working on vault combination lock

hooks.hook_text: Can you solve a riddle, crack a code, and crawl through a vault to earn Vegas' most exclusive cocktail experience?
hooks.visual_suggestion: Multi-step challenge sequence showing riddle, code, and vault entrance

hooks.hook_text: Only 12 seats. No reservations. Best Speakeasy 2025. The Lock at Horseshoe Vegas closes when they hit capacity.
hooks.visual_suggestion: Empty seats filling up in time-lapse, 'FULL' sign appearing

hooks.hook_text: While you're reading this, someone just crawled through the vault door into Vegas' most exclusive cocktail experience. The Lock has 12 seats. That's 11 left.
hooks.visual_suggestion: Real-time shot of nearly full speakeasy with countdown overlay

hooks.hook_text: The Cabinet of Curiosities closes at midnight. The Lock speakeasy inside? When the last riddle gets solved. Tonight's your only chance.
hooks.visual_suggestion: Clock showing 11:30 PM with mysterious speakeasy entrance in background

hooks.hook_text: What happens when Vegas' Best Speakeasy 2025 makes your cocktail based on a personality test?
hooks.visual_suggestion: Split screen: mood questionnaire vs. resulting custom cocktail

hooks.hook_text: Why are people crawling through vault doors at Horseshoe Vegas for a $30 cocktail?
hooks.visual_suggestion: Queue of people waiting to enter vault, expensive cocktail reveal

hooks.hook_text: What's behind the vault door that earned The Lock 'Best Speakeasy 2025' in a city with 847 bars?
hooks.visual_suggestion: Mysterious vault door opening to reveal award plaque and premium cocktail setup
